why_this_milestone_exists.purpose: Record that the canonical reproducibility path was made runnable from a fresh local setup and reproduced all stored five-game scores exactly.
why_this_milestone_exists.trigger: The documented canonical evaluation command initially failed in a fresh local environment due to script import path and eager LLM-client imports, then passed after narrow reproducibility-path fixes and asset installation.

changes_made.details: scripts/llm_optimization/evaluate_canonical_policies.py now inserts the repository root into sys.path before importing scripts.llm_optimization modules, so the documented direct script command works from the repository root.

scripts/llm_optimization/core/__init__.py now exposes LLMClient, LLMConfig, and create_llm_client lazily, and scripts/llm_optimization/core/llm_client.py only imports anthropic when constructing a client. API-free evaluation no longer requires provider packages.
A repo-local editable install was created and JAXAtari sprites/states were installed outside the repository via the documented install-sprites path.

scripts/llm_optimization/analysis/summarize_seeded_rq1_reruns.py was added to turn one or more unified-suite manifests into per-game completion counts, score distributions, deltas against canonical policies, and human-normalized summaries where available.

scripts/llm_optimization/run_rq1_seeded_rerun.sh was added to launch the five-game seeded RQ1 suite while prompting for provider API keys at runtime instead of storing credentials in repository artifacts.

current_interpretation.RQ1: Canonical saved policies remain exactly reproducible under the stored seeds and 10000-step protocol on this local macOS setup. This supports the reliability of existing saved-policy evidence but does not replace new multi-seed LeGPS reruns.
current_interpretation.RQ2: No new shortcut or robustness evidence was added.
current_interpretation.RQ3: No new task-variation adaptation evidence was added.
current_interpretation.RQ4: No new optimizer-ablation evidence was added.

remaining_gaps: Multiple seeded LeGPS reruns for RQ1 stability are still missing.
Systematic RQ2 shortcut and robustness probes are still missing.
RQ3 task-variation adaptation experiments are still missing.
Environment coverage is still limited to the current five canonical games.

next_steps.step: Run bash scripts/llm_optimization/run_rq1_seeded_rerun.sh for Pong, Freeway, Asterix, Breakout, and Skiing with a rotated provider key.
next_steps.why: This is still the main missing evidence for method stability across random seeds.

next_steps.step: Run the seeded-rerun summarizer after each RQ1 batch and commit the resulting summary JSON as thesis evidence.
next_steps.why: The thesis needs variance summaries, failure counts, and comparison against canonical scores rather than raw folders only.

next_steps.step: Start the RQ2 shortcut-probe design after the seeded-rerun result schema is settled.
next_steps.why: Shortcut probes need a stable reporting format to avoid becoming ad hoc videos or notes.
